description: Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit Malfunction
fix_summary: Clean MAF sensor, check for intake leaks, replace sensor if readings out of spec.

description: Manifold Absolute Pressure/Barometric Pressure Circuit Malfunction
fix_summary: Check vacuum lines, test MAP sensor voltage, replace if faulty.
Check IAT sensor resistance at known temps, inspect connector, replace sensor.

common_causes: Wiring issue in coolant temp circuit
fix_summary: Check sensor connector, test sensor resistance vs temp chart, replace if out of spec.
Check TPS voltage sweep (0.5V-4.5V), verify smooth transition, replace TPS if erratic.
Check O2 sensor voltage swing (0.1V-0.9V), inspect wiring, replace sensor if lazy or stuck.
Same procedure as P0130 but for bank 2.
Check long-term fuel trim (should be ±10%), inspect for vacuum leaks, clean injectors.
Check injector resistance (12-16 ohms typical), test wiring continuity, swap injectors to isolate.
Check fuel pump fuse and relay first, listen for pump prime on key-on, test voltage at pump connector.
Check spark plugs and coils, inspect for vacuum leaks, verify fuel pressure, compression test if needed.
Swap coil/plug with another cylinder to isolate. If misfire follows, replace that part.

description: Crankshaft Position Sensor A Circuit Malfunction
fix_summary: Check sensor gap, inspect reluctor ring for damage, test sensor resistance and AC voltage output while cranking.
Check sensor output, inspect timing chain for excessive slack, verify wiring continuity.
Clean EGR passages and valve, test valve operation with vacuum pump.
Verify O2 sensor operation first, check for exhaust leaks, replace cat if confirmed inefficient.
Check VSS output with scope or multimeter while spinning wheel, inspect wiring.
Clean IAC valve and throttle body, check for vacuum leaks, reset idle after cleaning.
Test battery voltage (12.6V resting, 13.5-14.5V running), check stator output, inspect ground connections.
Check ECU connectors, inspect CAN bus wiring, clear code and retest — may need ECU replacement.
